author: fwyzard
body:
#### PR description:

Move `QueueCache` and `EventCache` to `HeterogeneousCore/AlpakaInterface`.

Change the `EDMetadata` constructor for the asynchronous back-ends to match the synchronous back-end.

Add an `EDMetadataSentry` constructor with an explicit queue.

Delay the creation of device queues and events until they are actually needed:
  - if the metadata is created without an associated queue, try to reuse it from the first device data product being consumed. If that cannot be reused, or if the metadata queue is accessed before consuming any device products, allocate a new queue on demand;
  - allocate a device event only when needed.

No impact on the Run 3 HLT performance:
  - before: 1080  3 ev/s
  - after:  1082  1 ev/s

 measured with `CMSSW_16_1_0_pre4` on a machine with 2 AMD "Bergamo" 9754 128 cores and 4 NVIDIA L4 GPUs, running concurrent 16 jobs with 32 threads and 24 streams, over 10k events from run 402360, with the HLT menu `/online/collisions/2026/2e34/v1.1/HLT/V2`.


#### PR validation:

All units test pass.

HLT runs.
title: Rewrite the interface of `EDMetadata`
